museum_copy.title: @leo_guinan Solar Museum
museum_copy.subtitle: Community Archive proof-of-search map.
museum_copy.warning: Archive terrain, not reputation. Raw coverage ends where the archive/upload/API ends.

sun.mass_rule: sun mass is the topic-planet mass field plus multi-planet gravity bonus; semantic density is embedding compactness of the corpus surface
sun.cluster_method: sentence-transformer embeddings -> UMAP(2d, cosine) -> KMeans; cluster labels generated by local Ollama
